title: Trump’s new ‘Aliens’ website exploits UFO intrigue to demean immigrants
description: California struck “alien” from its labor code in 2015; states including Oregon, Colorado and Washington have since taken similar measures.

title: Steven Spielberg Surprises London Pub Crowd Amid Rave Reviews for UFO Thriller 'Disclosure Day'
description: Director Steven Spielberg and star Colman Domingo celebrated the upcoming release of 'Disclosure Day' at a London pub, as early critics declare the sci-fi thriller his best in 20 years and praise Emily Blunt's performance.

title: The People Connected to the New UFO Reveals Give Good Reason for Skepticism

title: UFO files: Dr. Lincoln LaPaz consulted for green fireball investigations
description: Discover how Dr. Lincoln LaPaz, a voluntary university expert, helped the military decode New Mexico’s mysterious green fireballs in the late‐1940s. The post UFO files: Dr. Lincoln LaPaz consulted for green fireball investigations appeared first on Film Daily .

title: UFO files: Senior intelligence officer departs JOC for UAP investigation
